suggestions: Add a Genkit OTel-enabled regression where a user-created OTel span runs inside a selected Genkit action. Assert the native Genkit bridge span stays suppressed while the unrelated user span remains recorded with the intended parent. The current record=false suppression is trace-wide, so this boundary must be proven and may require narrowing the implementation if the new test fails.

Add direct context-manager unit tests for the preserve-context symbol branch, pinning both prerequisites: a stored native OTel span and a marked active Datadog span. Also pin that unmarked or missing-stored-span cases keep the normal Datadog-to-OTel proxy behavior.

Add the complementary googleai ownership test with google-genai disabled: a source-proven googleai/ action should remain an llm span with model_provider=google, the registered model_name, and Genkit token metrics. The current test covers only the enabled-provider demotion branch.
test_output_summary: Three independent env-scrubbed processes all passed: default exact-version Genkit APM+LLMObs 20 passing/0 failing/0 pending; DD_TRACE_OTEL_ENABLED=true exact-version Genkit APM+LLMObs 20 passing/0 failing/0 pending; OTel context-manager 26 passing/0 failing/0 pending. The repaired tests prove named custom model/embedder identity, enabled googleai provider demotion without metrics, and one safe authoritative Genkit span with native raw input/output/vector omission. Coverage remains incomplete because the shared context-manager branch has no direct unit test, unrelated user OTel spans inside the suppressed native Genkit trace are not exercised, and the googleai provider-disabled identity/metrics branch is not exercised.

missing_test_cases.name: unrelated_otel_child_inside_genkit
missing_test_cases.description: With DD_TRACE_OTEL_ENABLED=true, create an unrelated user OTel span inside a selected Genkit action and prove only the native Genkit bridge span is suppressed. The user OTel span must remain recorded and correctly parented; trace-wide record=false suppression makes this a high-risk boundary.

missing_test_cases.name: context_manager_preserve_marker_contract
missing_test_cases.description: Directly test ContextManager.active() for marked active Datadog spans with and without a stored native OTel span, plus the unmarked control case, so the new shared-core symbol contract is pinned independently of Genkit integration behavior.

missing_test_cases.name: googleai_unowned_identity
missing_test_cases.description: With the google-genai LLMObs integration disabled, verify googleai/provider-model remains kind llm with provider google, registered model name, and Genkit token metrics. The enabled-provider workflow-demotion branch is already covered.
